name: simple-model-project-intelligence
description: Codex plugin for deterministic simple_model Project Intelligence workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and gate large repos with simple_model.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for using simple_model to ingest large in-progress repositories, resolve multi-file struct.json models, scan interfaces, emit code facts, route PR risk, generate dashboards, and run deterministic Project Intelligence gates.
defaultPrompt: Run Project Intelligence gates for my current changes.
Help adopt this large repo into struct.json.
